notes:
Fixes in v1.4.1:
- Fixed PowerPoint watermarking crash on the packaged build (PowerPoint.Application.Presentations / win32com.gen_py)
- PowerPoint now uses dynamic COM binding, no early-binding cache needed

Includes all v1.4.0 features:
- Batch processing - watermark an entire folder in one click
- Watermark presets - save and recall named configs
- Recent files dropdown
- Word document watermarking (.docx/.doc) with PDF export
- Gold accent theme
